untranslatable_reason: This is a risk psychology/mindset rule with entry conditions, not a position sizing rule. It describes mental preparation and system acceptance criteria (win rate thresholds, loss frequency tolerance, consecutive loss limits) but contains no specific sizing methodology, percentage allocation, or scaling mechanism. The parameters provided (max_acceptable_loss_frequency, min_required_win_rate, position_size_reduction_trigger) are entry/exit filters and system validators, not sizing instructions.
